label: MAVLink AI - 26 Local Geofence Monitor
info: Display/alert geofence example. The first valid position becomes home; Reset home captures the next position. The 500m horizontal and 120m relative-altitude limits are examples only. This flow does not configure or replace the autopilot geofence.

name: Monitoring only — configure the real fence in the flight controller
info: Edit the fenceMeters and altitudeMeters values in Compute distance from home. Output can feed the status dashboard or another UI.

name: Compute distance from home
